title: helianthus angustifolius subsp. giganteus
intro: Helianthus angustifolius subsp. giganteus, commonly known as the narrow-leafed sunflower, is a subspecies of the Helianthus angustifolius plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helianthus angustifolius subsp. giganteus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
